title: Added Local Analytics Tag Alias Mutation API
summary: Moved tag alias import, delete, and mutate-alias preview/apply routes into the local Studio app server while leaving promote and demote workflows for the next cross-file slice.
effect: Migrated local app pages can now import aliases, delete aliases, and preview/apply alias edits through /studio/api/analytics/import-tag-aliases, /studio/api/analytics/delete-tag-alias, /studio/api/analytics/mutate-tag-alias-preview, and /studio/api/analytics/mutate-tag-alias. The routes reuse existing alias mutation validation, registry target validation, atomic write, backup, logging, and activity helpers, while promotion and demotion remain on the old tag write server until the next slice.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, analytics adapter, config, and smoke files
tests/smoke/tag_route_shell_modules.py passed with loopback server permissions
node --check passed for assets/studio/js/tag-aliases-service.js and assets/studio/js/studio-transport.js
